events.summary: Feature scaffolded as chore/framework_tooling. 3-layer automation closing the loop on ios-code-connect (PR #277) + fitme-story T20 (PR #75). 5 tasks T1-T5; T1 (scaffold scripts) is the foundation T3+T4 depend on. ~2.0d total estimated effort. Per user directive 2026-05-10 'is the cmd automated when building a new ui feature' (answer: no) → 'Automate Code Connect for new UI features?' (answer: All 3 layers A+B+C).

T1-T4 reconciled to done after all 11 Code Connect PRs merged 2026-05-10. Layer A (PRs #279 + #77) + Layer B (PR #280) + Layer C (PR #281 superseded by fix #283 squash 8536fb8 + fitme-story #79) all shipped. Operator added FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN to BOTH repos at 06:38-06:39Z. Web dry-run verified clean post-PR #80. iOS dry-run verified clean post-PR #283 (npm CLI uses SPM wrapper at .figma-cc-tools/Package.swift to subprocess figma-swift parser). Only T5 (end-to-end test on next real new UI feature) remains.

Feature closed — current_phase: implementation → complete. T1-T4 done; T5 deferred for Figma Pro+Full-seat tier not granting code_connect:write scope (confirmed 2026-05-10 via OAuth invalid_scope rejection + PAT UI scope absence + Code Connect endpoint 403). Code automation is end-to-end functional EXCEPT the final API call to https://api.figma.com/v1/code_connect. All infrastructure remains valuable for future activation when account tier/seat unblocks the scope.

Phase transition implementation → complete. Feature closes with T1-T4 done + T5 deferred for Figma code_connect:write scope unavailability on Pro+Full-seat tier (confirmed via PAT UI absence + OAuth invalid_scope + 403 from POST /v1/code_connect). kill_criteria_resolution recorded. Re-activation path documented in ios-code-connect-workflow.md + backlog. No code changes needed when scope unblocks.
